title: Salt
body:
### Salt adds a food salting mechanic, as well as several other features and blocks.
Description in text form

Description

- Food can now be salted to improve the taste and add nutrition.
- Salting recipe is dynamic and controlled by "salt:can_be_salted" tag:
- Several mods, such as Farmer's Delight, are supported out of the box. - Nutrition value can be configured per food.

Rock Salt

- Rock Salt will generate underground (sililar to ores) in dripstone caves, ocean and beach biomes.
- When harvested, Rock Salt Ore will drop Raw Rock Salt, which is crafted into Salt.
- Salt can be also obtained by growing Salt Crystals or by evaporating water in a cauldron.

Other features

Other features: - All Salt blocks are dissolvable in water.
- Salt blocks will melt adjacent ice and snow blocks.
- Ice and snow can also be melted by sprinkling them with salt.
- The mod is highly configurable: - Tags are used for everything.
- All features can be turned off in a config.

--- #### List of supported mods for food salting: - Farmer's Delight - Miner's Delight - Delightful - Butchercraft - Quark - Aquaculture 2 - Croptopia - Nether Depths Upgrade Others can be added by a **datapack** or **KubeJS**.


[](https://discord.gg/FzHKGDW2et)

#### Enjoying the mod? Your support would allow me to continue working on it and on other mods! [](https://patreon.com/mortuusars?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) [](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=4VPMCBCLZVUEA)
